title: Heliotropium selleanum
taxonomy: Heliotropium selleanum is classified within the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage family. This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily herbaceous, with some species being shrubs or trees. Further research may be necessary to determine the precise classification of Heliotropium selleanum within the Boraginaceae family.
